title: feat: remove demo-mode auth bypass and DEMO_MODE bootstrap paths
motivation: Demo-only auth shortcuts and seeded runtime data/heartbeat jobs are outside PRD scope and introduce unnecessary security and operational noise.

in: Delete `/api/auth/demo-login` handler path and related tests.
Remove DEMO_MODE persona/sample-data seed modules from startup flow.
Remove demo health-check cron job and associated task queue churn.
Update docs that currently instruct DEMO_MODE usage for product runtime.
out: Removal of TEST_MODE-only endpoints used for CI harnesses.
Changes to production passkey flow semantics.

acceptance_criteria: Server startup no longer executes demo persona/data seeding or demo health-check cron hooks.
Authentication and startup paths align with production-like behavior and PRD scope.
test_plan: Run server auth/startup tests and ensure passkey + test-mode flows still pass.
Start server with and without DEMO_MODE env; verify demo hooks no longer run.
Validate docs references to DEMO_MODE are removed or explicitly marked legacy/non-product.
